evals.name: cubesat-launch-margin
evals.prompt: Calculate the Margin of Safety for a 6U CubeSat bracket made of Al-6061-T6 (Yield Strength 240 MPa) under a 10G axial launch load. The bracket cross-section is 50mm2 and supports a 2kg payload.
evals.expected_output: A report showing the stress calculation (~3.9 MPa) and a high positive Margin of Safety (~47).
